name: Fit To A Tee Golf Shop
about: Fit To A Tee Golf Shop is a comprehensive golf facility on Cape Cod offering a full-service pro shop, grass tee driving range, and indoor practice facilities. The venue specializes in club fittings, regripping services, and carries major brands like Titleist, Ping, Callaway, TaylorMade, Mizuno, and Tour Edge at competitive prices. Its unique offering includes the ability to test clubs both indoors using simulators and outdoors on a grass tee range, providing a comprehensive equipment testing experience. The facility hosts junior group lessons, indoor golf leagues, and offers club fitting appointments by reservation.
why_golfers_like_it: Ability to test clubs both indoors on simulators and outdoors on a grass tee range
Custom club fitting services with professional guidance and 1-hour appointments
Wide selection of major golf brands at prices comparable to big-box stores
Junior golf programs and indoor leagues for year-round play
In-house regripping with one of the largest grip selections available

food_and_drink.notes: No food services mentioned on the website
No alcohol services mentioned on the website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they also offer demo clubs that can be tested indoors or outdoors on the driving range. They also sell new and pre-owned clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, there are no food or drink services mentioned on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer junior group golf lessons for ages 9-15 and have family-friendly services.
